case_title: JAMES A HOWELLS VS. DAVIN A NILSSON et al

docket_entries.description: AMENDED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $495.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $1,500.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NILSSON, DAVIN A

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOWELLS, JAMES A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NILSSON, DAVIN A THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFT. VACATED ON 12/2/09 $3,990.00 RENT, $950.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $495.00 COSTS, $2,128.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, $1,500.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,063.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )
